title: March 21st, 2022
body:
record these lyrics

squirrel
magpie
goat
tiger
ok sure, but what are you in the ocean
oh shit, i never noticed that i'm always in it
i guess that means i'm a fish through and through
which is cool cuz so are you
just out here doin what doin do
and being human always feels too new
to me to be more than what i'm going through
today tomorrow is forewarning you
rising from darkness like the morning dew
yesterday swept away in a tide of grief
before you knew what was forming you
the deep dark core of you
and yo, your dreams tried to spoil you
pickin at the seems so you could see what they were pointing to
there's no point to you
there's no point to the ocean
it's all bowls that the water goes in
and if you blow when ya holdin
the holes sing
i'm well when i'm floating
slap my tail when i'm going
slip and fall when i'm walking
but that won't stop me evolving
i'm a shell of a man picked by a crab in the sand
to be home for a bit
so no, it's not what i planned
but i'm going with it
so i can play in a band

imadethispasswordverylongtoencouragemoreintentionalcomputeruse
